title: Nursery Rhyme. CCXCVII. Games.
content:
1. I am a gold lock.
        2. I am a gold key.
        1. I am a silver lock.
        2. I am a silver key.
        1. I am a brass lock.
        2. I am a brass key.
        1. I am a lead lock.
        2. I am a lead key.
        1. I am a monk lock.
        2. I am a monk key!
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. CCXCVII. Games."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
